summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VolunteerApp Smart Parse feature and core functionality. Smart Parse UI works correctly - user can parse text, manually edit form fields, and click 'Confirm & Create' with success message appearing. However, candidates are not persisting in the database.

critical_bugs.issue: Candidates created via Smart Parse are not persisting in database
critical_bugs.impact: Smart Parse success message shows but candidates don't appear in candidates list

test_data_issues.issue: Hardcoded candidate IDs in backend tests don't exist in database

integration_issues.issue: Success message displays but candidates don't persist
integration_issues.affected_flow: Smart Parse → Confirm & Create → Candidates List

passed_tests: Smart Parse form rendering after parsing
Public application form rendering with valid access code
action_item_for_main_agent: The reported issue 'can't confirm and save candidates via Smart Parse' appears resolved in the frontend UI - users can successfully parse text, edit forms, and see success messages. However, investigate the /api/smart-parse/confirm endpoint as candidates are not persisting in the database despite showing success. Also update backend test data with valid candidate IDs.
success_percentage: Backend: 40% (4/10 tests pass), Frontend: 90% (core functionality works, persistence issue)
